title: Amazon Product Scraper Input
description: Configure scraping mode, URLs or keywords, and marketplace.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Scraping mode: 'product' for direct URLs, 'search' for keyword search.

urls.title: Product URLs
urls.description: List of Amazon product URLs to scrape (product mode only).

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return.
